---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!-- Before filing: please search existing issues. For larger design
discussions, prefer a docs/discussions/<topic>.md PR — see the
existing entries under docs/discussions/ for examples. -->

## Problem

<!-- What user-facing problem does this solve? Lead with the user's
goal or frustration, not the proposed solution. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. Be specific about UX or API shape if you
have a clear picture; high-level pointers are fine if you don't. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit. -->

## Scope

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Mobile app
- [ ] Hub server
- [ ] Host-runner
- [ ] Templates / YAML
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Impact

<!-- Who benefits? Estimated frequency of use? Any workarounds today? -->

## Related references

<!-- Link any existing discussions, ADRs, plans, or similar issues. -->

- Existing discussions: `docs/discussions/`
- Existing decisions: `docs/decisions/`
- Existing plans: `docs/plans/`

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, citations to other tools, etc. -->
